name: Edu Market
description:
Edu Market – Your Smart Guide to Supporting and Shaping Your Child’s Future

What Does Edu Market Offer You?

1- Comprehensive Guide to Nurseries and Schools

We provide you with an up-to-date database featuring the best nurseries and schools in your area. Each institution comes with detailed information, ratings, services, and curricula, helping you make an informed decision that ensures a better future for your child.

2- Full Support for Parents and Students

At Edu Market, we understand that the educational journey extends beyond the classroom to include the family and home support. That’s why we offer practical tips and guides for parents on how to support their children both academically and psychologically, along with specialized articles and tools to help students achieve excellence.

3- Exclusive Offers and Discounts

Benefit from the best offers and discounts on tuition fees, educational services, and products. These are provided in collaboration with top educational institutions, ensuring your children receive outstanding education at a lower cost.

4- Integrated and Secure Educational Experience

With Edu Market, you can easily and securely browse and choose educational services. We offer multiple secure electronic payment methods suitable for everyone, along with continuous technical support to assist you at every step.

5- Innovative Solutions for Developing the Education System

We are constantly working to provide new solutions and ideas that contribute to educational development, whether by connecting parents with distinguished educational institutions or by offering evaluation and comparison tools to help you make the best decision.

Why Choose Edu Market?
* Reliability and Transparency: All information and ratings are verified and continuously updated.

* Ease of Use: A simple and user-friendly interface gives you quick access to everything you need.

* Supportive Community: Share your experiences and benefit from the expertise of other parents.

* Continuous Technical Support: Our team is ready to answer your inquiries and assist you at any time.

Start Your Journey with Edu Market Now
Download the app for free and discover a unique educational experience for your children, saving your time and effort, and ensuring the best start for their future.

Edu Market – The Future of Education Starts Here.

name: Sphoto
description:
اس فوتو :
أول تطبيق الكتروني في الكويت يجمع بين حجز تذاكر التصوير وتوثيق لحظاتك مع الفنانين في مكان واحد!
أكيد مليت من الانتظار في الطوابير الطويلة لحجز التصوير أو شراء التذاكر؟
اس فوتو يقدم لك الحل!
إس فوتو توفر تجربة سلسة وممتعة تتيح لك:
- احجز صور شخصية مع نجوم المسرح والفعاليات: خصص وقتك مع فنانك المفضل بضغطة زر.
- تذاكر إلكترونية سريعة: استلم تذكرتك مباشرة في هاتفك بدون تعب.
- دفع آمن وسريع: مع أنظمة دفع محلية وعالمية موثوقة.
- دخول بدون زحمة: استخدم تذكرك الإلكترونية لدخول سريع ومريح.
ليش إس فوتو؟
نعرف شغفكم بالفعاليات والمسرحيات في الكويت
نوفر عليكم الوقت والجهد
نضمن لكم تجربة خالية من التعقيدات
انتم بأيدي أمينة!
تعتبر اس فوتو جزء من sphoto group company، الرائدة في حلول حجز التذاكر وإدارة الفعاليات بدولة الكويت.
حمل التطبيق الحين مجاناً
 
واحجز تذكرتك وصورتك القادمة بكل سهولة ، وخلّد لحظاتك مع النجوم والفنانين بفعاليات ما تنسي!

name: Falta Game
description:
فريق كويتي يؤمن إن الترفيه مو بس "فلّه ووناسه"، لكن وراه أثر وفايدة… ويمكن حتى دخل ودخل قوي بعد.
من خلال تجربتنا الطويلة بعالم الترفيه، اكتشفنا إن الألعاب الجماعية والتحديات التفاعلية (multiplayer) هي أكثر شي يشد الناس، تقضي وقتك فيها وتستانس، وتفتح لك أبواب للتفكير، التنافس، وحتى تكوين علاقات يديدة.
وشفنا بعد إن الناس تقعد بالساعات على وسائل التواصل، فقلنا: ليش ما ندمج هالعالمين؟ نخلق منصة ترفيهية ممتعة، اجتماعية، وتفيد الكل  سواء لاعب، متابع، أو حتى جهة تسويقية تبي توصل لجمهور حيّ وتفاعلي.
من هني طلعت فكرة فلتة!
واخترنا اسمها بعناية، لأن كلنا نعرف شنو تعني كلمة "فلته" بالكويتي… الشخص اللي مميز بشغله، ذكي بحركته، وسبّاق بخطوته.
فلتة! هي الملهم الأول للتحديات والبطولات. فيها الأسئلة والأجوبة، السرعة والبديهة، والضحك والمنافسة. فيها مستقبل الألعاب… من التفاعل المباشر إلى الواقع الافتراضي والميتافيرس.
إحنا ما نسوي بس لعبة…
إحنا قاعدين نبني عالم كامل، فيه وناسة، تنافس، شطارة، وربح بعد.
فلتة!
لأن كل واحد فينا فيه فلتة… بس نبي نطلعها

name: Fishtail
description:
Fishtail App assists the Artistic Swimming Community by offering tools simplifying the choreography of routines using the new rules and exporting codes for the Coach Card in easy illustrated steps. 
	The Application offers multiple features using clear illustrations, updated descriptions and an integrated calculator.
    • Free Features:
        ◦ A Free Library with a search engine to learn more about the different codes and how they are applied. Including Hybrid and Acrobatic Codes.
        ◦ Catalogue of more than 500 examples of ACRO codes and a breakdown of each move.
        ◦ Create files to calculate and generate code for coach card. Includes Hybrid and ACRO.
            ▪ Import and Edit Examples from Catalogue.
            ▪ Read notes for each code to learn more about the definition, declaration, allowance and preferred execution.
            ▪ Record up to 3 Videos of the ACRO.
            ▪ Unlimited sharing with other users.
            ▪ View steps for each element with description, value and codes.
            ▪ Export PDF with code and full description of each component.
        ◦ Share your files with our international network of Technical Controllers to get their advice on declaration.
            •⁠  ⁠Hybrid builder calculator and code generator
            •⁠  ⁠⁠All codes are updated to January 2025 rules
            •⁠  ⁠Important version update: Mandatory email verification for all users
            •⁠  ⁠⁠Limit usage of filter per day for non-subscribers
            •⁠  ⁠New Hybrid Pattern Change (PC) sequence
            •⁠  ⁠⁠General improvement and bug fixes

name: Nuqat Game
description:
Nuqat -  Ultimate Trivia Game for Family and Friends!
 
Nuqat is a game app, perfect for family gatherings and friend meet-ups looking to add fun and challenge to any dull moment. Whether in group settings or at home, Nuqat offers a great way for everyone to entertain themselves, test their knowledge, and challenge each other.
 
The app allows users to enjoy trivia in various settings—whether on mobile, tablet, or computer. For larger gatherings, users can even project the game onto a big screen using Apple TV or a cable connection for a more immersive experience.
 
With a database of over 50,000 carefully selected questions, Nuqat lets players test their knowledge across a range of categories, including general knowledge, geography, Arab and international sports, movies and series from around the world, and much more.

name: Thabbit Game
description:
The game “Thabbit” is a fun trivia game perfect for gatherings and social get-togethers, adding an atmosphere of challenge and enjoyment. It offers over 35 categories, each filled with diverse and entertaining questions that help you learn new facts and discover just how much knowledge your friends have. The categories range from cultural, sports, and entertainment questions to challenges that test your general knowledge and ability to answer. You can choose from one to six categories that suit you and start the challenge.
Don’t hesitate … and Thabbit.

description:

furniture made by rattan Materials,

Let’s delve into the heart of Melocanna: pays homage to the bamboo species we cherish. It’s a harmonious fusion of ‘Melo’ (representing melody and harmony) and ‘Canna’ (derived from bamboo’s botanical rattan). With Melocanna, we resonate with the soothing notes of nature.
More Than Furniture: We’re not just a furniture company; we’re a community rooted in passion and commitment. Our skilled craftsmen and designers breathe life into every bamboo creation, ensuring that each piece embodies both functionality and aesthetics.

name: Vecasa
description:
With our app, you can browse and shop from a wide variety of products, including decorations, gifts, costumes, and more. Our product range is constantly updated to ensure that you have access to the latest and greatest products.

Our app is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy for you to find what you're looking for. You can browse products by category, search for specific items, and filter your search results by price, rating, and other criteria.

In addition to shopping, our app also offers a range of features to enhance your shopping experience. You can create a wishlist of your favorite products, track your orders and delivery status, and receive notifications about new products and promotions.

Our app also offers a secure and seamless checkout process, allowing you to make purchases with confidence. You can choose from a range of payment options, including credit card, PayPal, and more, and enjoy fast and reliable shipping to your doorstep.

So why wait? Download our app today and start shopping for all your needs! Whether you're looking for a costume, a romantic, Eid, Valentine's Day gift, our app has got you covered.

name: Sultani
description:
SULTANI: Your Personalized Diet Subscription

Elevate your wellness journey with SULTANI, the ultimate app designed to make your diet transformation seamless and sustainable. Say goodbye to generic diets and hello to a tailored, science-backed approach that empowers you to reach your health goals.

Key Features:

Personalized Meal Plans: Bid farewell to one-size-fits-all diets. Our app crafts custom meal plans based on your preferences, dietary restrictions, and health objectives. Whether you're aiming to lose weight, build muscle, or manage specific conditions, your meals are designed just for you.

Nutrition Tracking: Stay on top of your nutritional intake effortlessly. Log your meals and track your macros with our intuitive interface. Understand how your food choices align with your goals and make informed decisions.

Food Database: Access a comprehensive database of foods and ingredients, complete with nutritional information. From supermarket finds to restaurant dishes, you'll always have the details you need at your fingertips.

Flexible Planning: Life can be unpredictable, but your diet doesn't have to be. Adjust your meal plan on the fly to accommodate events, outings, and special occasions while staying true to your goals.

Holistic Approach: SULTANI believes in nourishing both body and mind. Explore our collection of mindfulness and self-care resources to support your overall well-being journey.

Progress Tracking: Watch your transformation unfold with visual progress tracking. Photos, weight measurements, and notes help you celebrate milestones and stay motivated.

Premium Subscription: Supercharge your experience with our premium subscription. Unlock advanced features, such as direct consultations with registered dietitians, exclusive recipes, and in-depth nutritional insights.

Community Support: Join a vibrant community of like-minded individuals. Share your successes, exchange tips, and find motivation from others on a similar path.

Transform your relationship with food and embrace a healthier, happier you. Download SULTANI now and embark on a journey towards sustainable, personalized nutrition.

name: LIVI
description:
Welcome to Livi App, where style meets comfort at your fingertips! Discover a world of exquisite furniture and elevate your living spaces with our curated collection. Immerse yourself in the ultimate shopping experience with our user-friendly app designed exclusively for Apple devices.

Key Features:

Sleek Interface: Navigate seamlessly through our app with a sleek and intuitive design. Finding the perfect furniture piece for your home has never been this easy.

Curated Collections: Explore carefully curated collections that cater to various tastes and design preferences. From modern minimalism to classic elegance, we have the perfect piece to complement your style.

Personalized Recommendations: Receive personalized suggestions based on your preferences and browsing history. Our app learns your style to provide tailored recommendations, making your shopping experience more enjoyable.

Secure Checkout: Shop with confidence using our secure and convenient checkout process. Your payment information is safeguarded, ensuring a smooth and worry-free transaction.

Exclusive Deals: Stay updated on the latest promotions and exclusive deals. Enjoy special discounts and offers only available to our app users.

Real Customer Reviews: Make informed decisions with genuine reviews from fellow shoppers. Hear about their experiences and get insights into the quality and durability of our furniture.

Wish List: Save your favorite pieces for later with our convenient Wish List feature. Easily access and review your selected items whenever inspiration strikes.

Download Livi App now and transform your living spaces with elegance and style. Redefine the way you shop for furniture – it's time to create a home that reflects your personality. Welcome to a world where comfort and design come together seamlessly.

name: Ghaslah
description:
Description:
Introducing Ghaslah App, your personal gateway to a new era of car, carabans, yacht, boat, jetski care. Elevate your vehicle washing experience with the convenience of our on-demand mobile service. Ghaslah, meaning "wash" in Arabic, brings the spa treatment directly to your doorstep.
Key Features:
- On-Demand Luxury: Ghaslah App delivers professional car washing services wherever you are. Schedule a wash at home, work, or anywhere in between.
- Reliable Professionals: Our team of skilled and trustworthy car care specialists ensures your vehicle receives meticulous attention and a flawless finish.
- Eco-Friendly Solutions: Embrace sustainability with our eco-conscious waterless cleaning technology. Ghaslah App cares for your car and the environment.
- Tailored Packages: Customize your car's spa day with a range of services. From exterior pampering to interior rejuvenation, choose the package that suits your car's needs.
- Real-Time Tracking: Keep tabs on your Ghaslah professional as they travel to your location. No more guesswork—know exactly when to expect your car's spa session.
- Effortless Booking: Our intuitive app makes booking a breeze. Just a few taps, and your car is queued up for a rejuvenating Ghaslah experience.
- Secure Payments: Enjoy peace of mind with our secure and transparent payment system. Clear, straightforward pricing ensures a worry-free transaction.
- Exclusive Offers: Dive into a world of perks with Ghaslah App. Unlock special offers and loyalty rewards with each pampering session.
Revitalize your car with the touch of Ghaslah. Download the app now and treat your vehicle to the luxury it deserves. Ghaslah App – where convenience meets car care excellence!

name: GigApp
description:
نظام يعمل على الانترنت يتضمن طلبات مضافة من قبل الشركات الطالبة لمقدمين خدمات معينه بفترة معينة وبمبلغ معين مع اختيار نوع مقدمين الخدمة المطلوبين مع اتاحة البحث لمقدمين الخدمة للتقديم لاوامر التشغيل المضافة بسهولة ويسر.
ويضم النظام تسجيل الحضور لمقدمى الخدمات المشتركين بامر شغل معين مع امكانية ظهور تقارير باعداد الموظفين سواء الذكور منهم او الاناث او تقرير مادى لتكلفة امر الشغل على الشركة العارضة لامر الشغل.
